steps.title: Apply the factoring from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $-24-3x = -3 \cdot 5 = -15$. That matches the correct answer, so A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above is $-15$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
